message: feat: expose split helpers in fnp-python (franken_numpy-ls7f)

oracle parity, `take(axis)` reshape/scalar semantics, in-place `put`/`place`/`putmask`/`fill_diagonal` copy-back semantics, `vstack`/`hstack` scalar-promotion parity with generator rejection and NumPy `dtype=`/`casting=` fallback, `dstack`/`column_stack` scalar/object fallback parity, `indices(dtype)` grid parity, `diag` vector/matrix offset parity, `diagflat` flatten/offset parity with precise dtype preservation, `diagonal(offset, axis1, axis2)` parity across arbitrary axes, `fill_diagonal(wrap)` rectangular and equal-length N-D parity with cyclic value assignment, `ix_` bool/nonzero normalization and empty-input dtype parity, dense/sparse `meshgrid(*xi, copy, indexing)` parity including empty, scalar, flattened, object, and writeback-view behavior, `mgrid[...]` dense slice-object parity including single-slice vs tuple shape, defaulted bounds, and float32/complex-count dtypes, `ogrid[...]` sparse slice-object parity including tuple return shape and dtype preservation, `r_[...]` Rust-backed numeric/scalar/slice parity with NumPy directive fallback, `c_[...]` column-stack parity with 1-D promotion plus directive/object fallback, `ravel_multi_index(mode, order)` parity including empty and scalar cases, `unravel_index(order)` parity including 0-D rejection and shape-preserving integer outputs, diagonal/triangle index tuple parity, shape-only `*_from` wrappers for arbitrary ndarray dtypes, `axis=None` flatten semantics for `take_along_axis` and `put_along_axis`, overlap-safe view mutation parity, short-condition truncation parity, first-match `select` behavior, large-uint64 coverage, full `choose(mode='raise'|'wrap'|'clip')` parity, integer exponent tuple output for `frexp`, signed fractional/integral tuple parity for `modf`, scalar replacement parity for `nan_to_num`, and module export wiring |
